instruction: Capture this snippet from website docs.anthropic.com into 01_capture/influential/2026-04-04__structured-outputs-clip.md: "Teams get more leverage from agent tooling when they treat prompts, evals, and review loops as one system rather than three separate concerns. The practical bottleneck shifts from generating text to deciding what is safe to ship and what needs another pass."

params.content: Teams get more leverage from agent tooling when they treat prompts, evals, and review loops as one system rather than three separate concerns. The practical bottleneck shifts from generating text to deciding what is safe to ship and what needs another pass.
